summary: This is an extremely brief post where Joel Spolsky expresses excitement about his blog content being translated into 15 different languages. The post consists of just a single exclamatory sentence with a link to a language signup page. It reflects the growing international readership of Joel on Software during its early years. The post serves as a milestone marker rather than a substantive essay.
key_points: Joel on Software had been translated into 15 languages by mid-2002, demonstrating significant international reach
Joel actively encouraged community-driven translations of his writing
The post reflects the early-2000s blogging culture of short, informal updates
key_insight: Joel on Software had achieved remarkable international reach by 2002, with community volunteers translating the blog into 15 languages.
